source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
	EOMONTH(CASE WHEN ML.MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C','CTA-C') THEN ML.ActualDate END) AS RevenueMonthDate,
	M.ACU_ID AS ACU_BranchID,
	M.BranchName,
	M.Market_OpCo_Reporting AS Market,
	P.ACU_ProductID,
	P.TX_Product_Reporting AS Product,
	S.ACU_MarketingAccountID,
	S.TX_SourceCode AS Subsource,
	S.LeadSubSource AS LeadSubSource,
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN J.JobID END) -
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1) IN ('5','3') 
	AND (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 
	THEN J.JobID END) AS [Jobs # REV],
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END),0) -
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1) IN ('5','3') THEN 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) END),0)
	AS [Jobs $ REV],
	I.Name AS Name,
	J.ContractID

FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD L
	JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON J.LeadID=L.LeadID
	JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_MARKET_GROUP M ON M.BranchID=J.ProductionBranchID 
	--LEFT JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_ACU_MARKET MACU ON MACU.BranchID=M.BranchID
	JOIN EDW.DIM_MKTNG_PRODUCT_MAPPING P ON P.ProductID= J.ProductID AND P.MAPPINGIND<>'UNMAP'
	--LEFT JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_ACU_PRODUCT PACU ON PACU.ProductID=P.ProductID
	JOIN EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING S ON S.LeadSubSourceID=L.LeadSubSourceID AND TX_SourceGroup NOT IN ('NA','0') AND S.MAPPINGIND<>'UNMAP'
	--LEFT JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_ACU_SUBSOURCE SACU ON SACU.LeadSubSource=S.TX_SourceCode
	JOIN EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL ML ON ML.JOBID=J.JOBID 
	AND ML.MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C','CTA-C') AND ML.ActualDate IS NOT NULL
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.[JobStatusID]=JS.[JobStatusID]
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_INSTALLER I ON I.InstallerID=J.InstallerID_1
	

WHERE (CASE WHEN ML.MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C','CTA-C') THEN ML.ActualDate END) BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND GETDATE()
	AND (CAST(J.ContractDate AS DATE)>='2020-01-01' OR CAST(J.ContractDate AS DATE)='1900-01-01')
	AND L.BranchID NOT IN ('MAC-GSCLT','MAC-GSDC','REN-') --'PBC-PGPOR','PBC-PGSEA'
	AND M.Division <> 'G.Pacific Gutter'
	--AND L.ProductID NOT IN ('PBC-3')
	--AND RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],2)!='-0' AND right(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],1)!='-' AND EverNetIssued=1

GROUP BY EOMONTH(CASE WHEN ML.MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C','CTA-C') THEN ML.ActualDate END)
,M.ACU_ID, M.BranchName, M.Market_OpCo_Reporting, P.ACU_ProductID, P.TX_Product_Reporting, S.ACU_MarketingAccountID, S.TX_SourceCode, S.LeadSubSource,
I.Name, J.ContractID

ORDER BY EOMONTH(CASE WHEN ML.MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('SWR-C','HSI-C','PBC-C','RTW-C','FHI-C','MAC-S','MXH-C','PHI-C','CTA-C') THEN ML.ActualDate END)
,M.ACU_ID, M.BranchName, M.Market_OpCo_Reporting, P.ACU_ProductID, P.TX_Product_Reporting, S.ACU_MarketingAccountID, S.TX_SourceCode, S.LeadSubSource,
I.Name, J.ContractID

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_FACT_JOB')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_FACT_JOB;

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT EOMONTH(L.EntryDate) AS EntryMonthDate, 
	M.ACU_ID AS ACU_BranchID,
	M.BranchName,
	M.Market_OpCo_Reporting AS Market,
	P.ACU_ProductID,
	P.TX_Product_Reporting AS Product,
	S.ACU_MarketingAccountID,
	S.TX_SourceCode AS Subsource,
	S.LeadSubSource AS LeadSubSource,
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT L.LeadID) AS [Raw # MRK],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EverSet=1 THEN L.LeadID END) AS [Set # MRK],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],2)!='-0' AND right(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],1)!='-' AND EverNetIssued=1 THEN L.LeadID END) AS [Net Issue # MRK],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],2)!='-0' AND right(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],1)!='-' AND EverSat=1 THEN L.LeadID END) AS [Demo # MRK],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN J.JobID END) AS [Sold # MRK],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1)='5' AND 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN J.JobID END) AS [BTD # MRK],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1)='3' AND 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN J.JobID END) AS [Cancel # MRK],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN J.JobID END) -
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1) IN ('5','3') 
	AND (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN J.JobID END) AS [Net Sales # MRK],
	
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END),0) AS [Gross Sales $ MRK],
	
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1)='5' THEN 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) END),0) AS [BTD $ MRK],
	
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1)='3' THEN 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) END),0) AS [Cancel $ MRK],
	
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END),0) -
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1) IN ('5','3') THEN 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) END),0) AS [Net Sales $ MRK]

FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD L
	JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_MARKET_GROUP M ON M.BranchID=L.BranchID 
	--LEFT JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_ACU_MARKET MACU ON MACU.BranchID=M.BranchID
	JOIN EDW.DIM_MKTNG_PRODUCT_MAPPING P ON P.ProductID=L.ProductID AND P.MAPPINGIND<>'UNMAP'
	--LEFT JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_ACU_PRODUCT PACU ON PACU.ProductID=P.ProductID
	JOIN EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING S ON S.LeadSubSourceID=L.LeadSubSourceID AND TX_SourceGroup NOT IN ('NA','0') AND S.MAPPINGIND<>'UNMAP'
	--LEFT JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_ACU_SUBSOURCE SACU ON SACU.LeadSubSource=S.TX_SourceCode
	LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON J.LeadID=L.LeadID
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.[JobStatusID]=JS.[JobStatusID]

WHERE L.EntryDate BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND GETDATE()
	AND L.BranchID NOT IN ('MAC-GSCLT','MAC-GSDC','REN-') --'PBC-PGPOR','PBC-PGSEA'
	AND M.Division <> 'G.Pacific Gutter'
	AND L.ProductID NOT IN ('PBC-3')
	--AND L.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH')

GROUP BY EOMONTH(L.EntryDate),M.ACU_ID, M.BranchName, M.Market_OpCo_Reporting, P.ACU_ProductID, P.TX_Product_Reporting, S.ACU_MarketingAccountID, S.TX_SourceCode, S.LeadSubSource

ORDER BY EOMONTH(L.EntryDate),M.ACU_ID, M.BranchName, M.Market_OpCo_Reporting, P.ACU_ProductID, P.TX_Product_Reporting, S.ACU_MarketingAccountID, S.TX_SourceCode, S.LeadSubSource

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_FACT_LEAD_MKT')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_FACT_LEAD_MKT;

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
	EOMONTH(CASE WHEN J.[ContractDate] IS NULL THEN L.ApptDate ELSE J.ContractDate END) AS ApptMonthDate,
	M.ACU_ID AS ACU_BranchID,
	M.BranchName,
	M.ACU_MARKET AS Market,
	P.ACU_ProductID,
	P.ACU_Product AS Product,
	S.ACU_MarketingAccountID,
	S.TX_SourceCode AS Subsource,
	S.LeadSubSource AS LeadSubSource,
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],2)!='-0' AND RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],1)!='-' AND EverNetIssued=1 THEN L.LeadID END) AS [Net Issue # SLS],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],2)!='-0' AND RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],1)!='-' AND EverSat=1 THEN L.LeadID END) AS [Demo # SLS],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN J.JobID END) AS [Sold # SLS],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1)='5' AND (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 
	THEN J.JobID END) AS [BTD # SLS],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1)='3' AND (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 
	THEN J.JobID END) AS [Cancel # SLS],
	
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 THEN J.JobID END) -
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1) IN ('5','3') AND 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END)>0 
	THEN J.JobID END) AS [Net Sales # SLS],
	
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END),0) AS [Gross Sales $ SLS],
	
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1)='5' THEN 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) END),0) AS [BTD $ SLS],
	
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1)='3' THEN 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) END),0) AS [Cancel $ SLS],
	
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END),0) -
	ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID,1) IN ('5','3') THEN 
	(CASE WHEN J.[JobNetAmt]>0 AND J.DIVISION NOT IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.[JobNetAmt] ELSE J.[GrossAmount] END) END),0) AS [Net Sales $ SLS]
	
FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD L
	--JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_MARKET_GROUP M ON M.BranchID=L.BranchID 
	JOIN EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN M on M.BranchID=L.BranchID
	--LEFT JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_ACU_MARKET MACU ON MACU.BranchID=M.BranchID
	--JOIN EDW.DIM_MKTNG_PRODUCT_MAPPING P ON P.ProductID=L.ProductID AND P.MAPPINGIND<>'UNMAP'
	JOIN EDW_DUN.DIM_PRODUCT_EXTN P on P.ProductID=L.ProductID AND P.MappingInd<>'UNMAP'
	--LEFT JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_ACU_PRODUCT PACU ON PACU.ProductID=P.ProductID
	JOIN EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING S ON S.LeadSubSourceID=L.LeadSubSourceID AND TX_SourceGroup NOT IN ('NA','0') AND S.MAPPINGIND<>'UNMAP'
	--LEFT JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_ACU_SUBSOURCE SACU ON SACU.LeadSubSource=S.TX_SourceCode
	LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON J.LeadID=L.LeadID
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.[JobStatusID]=JS.[JobStatusID]

WHERE (CASE WHEN J.[ContractDate] IS NULL THEN L.ApptDate ELSE J.ContractDate END) BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND GETDATE()
	AND L.BranchID NOT IN ('MAC-GSCLT','MAC-GSDC','REN-') --'PBC-PGPOR','PBC-PGSEA'
	AND M.Division_MKTG <> 'G.Pacific Gutter'
	--AND L.ProductID NOT IN ('PBC-3')
	AND EverNetIssued=1
	--AND M.ACU_ID='4017' and 

GROUP BY EOMONTH(CASE WHEN J.[ContractDate] IS NULL THEN L.ApptDate ELSE J.ContractDate END),
M.ACU_ID, M.BranchName, M.ACU_Market, P.ACU_ProductID, P.ACU_Product, S.ACU_MarketingAccountID, S.TX_SourceCode, S.LeadSubSource

ORDER BY EOMONTH(CASE WHEN J.[ContractDate] IS NULL THEN L.ApptDate ELSE J.ContractDate END),
M.ACU_ID, M.BranchName, M.ACU_Market, P.ACU_ProductID, P.ACU_Product, S.ACU_MarketingAccountID, S.TX_SourceCode, S.LeadSubSource

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_FACT_LEAD_SLS')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE OUT.CUBESW_SUMM_FACT_LEAD_SLS;
